title: poa compressa var. muralis
intro: Poa compressa var. muralis, also known as rough meadow-grass, is a subspecies of the Poa compressa plant, a type of grass native to Europe, Asia, and North America. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Poa compressa var. muralis include reducing swelling and pain, as well as treating wounds and skin conditions. The plant can be prepared into teas, infusions, and tinctures for its medicinal use, although its preparation and dosage should be done under the guidance of a qualified healthcare professional.
